channel.title: Blogspot on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Blogspot on Zymacs

item.title: My first post with hugo
item.description: Dumped blogger I set up a site on blogger (Google’s blogspot) and dumped it for a Hugo design that caught my eye. I thought I could learn some css building it myself. Feel good from doing it myself from scratch. But boy is CSS boring! And I only realized this after 4 hours of centering divs and hunting for unclosed tags. Now the day had almost come to an end and I was feeling guilty for the waste that it’d been.
